descriptionTemplate: Remove the {Stagnation} state from all cards in hand. Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP. Add 1 {Marvelous Cuisine} to your hand. Inflict [{Poison}:Arg2] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on all enemies.
